html:
AGREEMENT BETWEEN [COMPANY A] AND [COMPANY B]

RECITALS

WHEREAS, Company A and Company B wish to establish a business relationship whereby Company A will provide [DESCRIPTION OF SERVICES/PRODUCTS] to Company B; and

This Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into on [DATE] ("Effective Date") by and between [COMPANY A], a [STATE/COUNTRY] corporation with its principal place of business at [ADDRESS] ("Company A"), and [COMPANY B], a [STATE/COUNTRY] corporation with its principal place of business at [ADDRESS] ("Company B").

WHEREAS, the parties wish to set forth the terms and conditions of their relationship in this Agreement.

ARTICLE 1: DEFINITIONS

For the purposes of this Agreement, the following definitions shall apply:

* "Services" means the [DESCRIPTION OF SERVICES] to be provided by Company A to Company B.
* "Products" means the [DESCRIPTION OF PRODUCTS] to be provided by Company A to Company B.
* "Confidential Information" means any and all information, whether written or oral, that is disclosed by one party to the other party, including but not limited to trade secrets, business strategies, and technical data.

ARTICLE 2: TERM AND TERMINATION

The term of this Agreement shall commence on the Effective Date and shall continue for a period of [LENGTH OF TERM] months/years. Upon expiration of the initial term, this Agreement shall automatically renew for successive [LENGTH OF RENEWAL TERM] month/year periods unless either party gives written notice of termination to the other party at least [NUMBER] days prior to the end of the then-current term.

Either party may terminate this Agreement upon [NUMBER] days' written notice to the other party in the event of a material breach of this Agreement by the other party that remains uncured for [NUMBER] days.

ARTICLE 3: OBLIGATIONS OF COMPANY A

Company A shall:

* Provide the Services and/or Products to Company B in accordance with the terms and conditions of this Agreement.
* Ensure that all Services and/or Products provided to Company B are of high quality and meet the standards of Company B.
* Maintain the confidentiality of all Confidential Information disclosed by Company B.

ARTICLE 4: OBLIGATIONS OF COMPANY B

Company B shall:

* Pay Company A the fees and expenses set forth in Article 5 below.
* Provide Company A with all necessary information and assistance required to perform the Services and/or provide the Products.
* Maintain the confidentiality of all Confidential Information disclosed by Company A.

ARTICLE 5: FEES AND EXPENSES

Company B shall pay Company A the following fees and expenses:

* A monthly fee of $[AMOUNT] for the Services and/or Products provided by Company A.
* Reimbursement of all reasonable expenses incurred by Company A in connection with the provision of the Services and/or Products.

ARTICLE 6: INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY

Company A retains all right, title, and interest in and to the Services and/or Products, including all intellectual property rights thereto. Company B shall not acquire any rights or interests in the Services and/or Products, except as expressly set forth in this Agreement.

ARTICLE 7: CONFIDENTIALITY

The parties agree to maintain the confidentiality of all Confidential Information disclosed by the other party. Neither party shall disclose any Confidential Information to any third party without the prior written consent of the other party.

ARTICLE 8: REPRESENTATIONS AND WARRANTIES

Each party represents and warrants to the other that:

* It has the right to enter into this Agreement and to perform its obligations hereunder.
* It shall comply with all applicable laws and regulations in the performance of its obligations under this Agreement.

ARTICLE 9: LIMITATION OF LIABILITY

In no event shall either party be liable to the other for any indirect, special, punitive, or consequential damages, including but not limited to loss of profits, revenue, or data, arising out of or related to this Agreement.

ARTICLE 10: GOVERNING LAW

This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of [STATE/COUNTRY]. Any disputes arising out of or related to this Agreement shall be resolved through [DISPUTE RESOLUTION PROCESS].

By signing below, the parties acknowledge that they have read, understand, and agree to be bound by the terms and conditions of this Agreement.

COMPANY A:

Title: __________________________________
Date: __________________________________

COMPANY B:

Name: __________________________________
Title: __________________________________
Date: __________________________________
